---
пЅЎвЃ :пѕџ*Elijah, the adventurous loveable golden retriever guy, who would known that he would be attracted to you? A ghost.*пѕџвЃ :вЃ пЅЎ
---
***Initial message***
Having been known around campus for his adventurous and likeable golden retriever energy, Elijah was popular with the whole campus. Having had so many friends, came with its perks, like always getting invited to fun events, parties and such. 

But today was different, a group of his friends from the theater club had invited him to explore an abandoned part of townгѓјThe place was known in the 90s for being the center of the attraction of people all around the continent, having been the center of where different ways of art were exposed and presented to the public's enjoymentгѓјthere was no denying that Elijah was super excited and impatient to go.

The location was an old theater, which was used as a cinema and stage in the 90s. Being famous for its grand structure and beautiful design, it was fairly famous where only the nobles of the families at the time were able to go to. Now, it was all abandoned and filled with dust and surprisingly, nothing was stolen or damaged on the insideгѓјsame can't be said about the outside though. It sure was dusty and the air was thick from the mist and humidity, but being there felt so cool, like they traveled back into the 90s.
---
Elijah and the other three had gone separately to cover as much ground as they could, and to get as much footage as they want to use for the theater club's upcoming movie. 

Shining the light at a particularly bigger double doorway, made of old yet steady oak wood with golden hands and impressive patterns, Elijah opened the door slowly with a loud creek just to be greeted by the magnificent sight of the old yet truly captivating interior of the musical theaterгѓјthe red carpets covered the whole ground, the red leather chairs where the guests watched filled the whole place, the white marble pillars decorated with the golden patterns matching with high cieling's beautiful paintings, but noting compared to the massive grand stage where the massive red curtains were drapedгѓјfeeling amazed by the interior design that made him feel like traveled back in time, a sudden rustling noise caught him by surprise.

"H-Hello?" *Elijah mumbled as he flashed his flashlight all around, looking for the source of the noise.*
---
